css: body { font-family: 'Georgia', serif; font-size: 11pt; line-height: 1.7; max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 2cm; } h1 { font-size: 2em; border-bottom: 2px solid #333; padding-bottom: 0.3em; page-break-before: always; page-break-after: avoid; } h1:first-of-type { page-break-before: avoid; } h2 { font-size: 1.4em; color: #222; margin-top: 2em; page-break-after: avoid; } h3 { font-size: 1.15em; color: #444; page-break-after: avoid; } p { margin: 0.6em 0; } li { margin: 0.2em 0; } pre { font-family: 'Fira Code', 'Consolas', monospace; font-size: 8.5pt; line-height: 1.45; background: #f5f5f5; border-left: 3px solid #0066cc; border-radius: 0 4px 4px 0; padding: 0.9em 1.1em; white-space: pre-wrap; word-break: break-all; overflow-x: hidden; page-break-inside: avoid; margin: 1em 0; } pre code { font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; background: none; border: none; padding: 0; white-space: inherit; } code { font-family: 'Fira Code', 'Consolas', monospace; font-size: 8.5pt; background: #f0f0f0; border-radius: 3px; padding: 1px 4px; } blockquote { border-left: 4px solid #0066cc; margin: 1em 0; padding: 0.5em 1em; color: #444; background: #f0f6ff; border-radius: 0 4px 4px 0; page-break-inside: avoid; } blockquote p { margin: 0.3em 0; } table { border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; margin: 1em 0; font-size: 10pt; page-break-inside: avoid; } th, td { border: 1px solid #ccc; padding: 0.4em 0.7em; text-align: left; } th { background: #f0f0f0; font-weight: bold; } tr:nth-child(even) { background: #fafafa; } .katex-display { overflow-x: auto; overflow-y: hidden; margin: 0.8em 0; page-break-inside: avoid; } .katex { font-size: 1.05em; } hr { border: none; border-top: 1px solid #ccc; margin: 1.5em 0; } table, figure, blockquote, pre { orphans: 3; widows: 3; }

script.content: renderMathInElement(document.body, { delimiters: [ {left: '$$', right: '$$', display: true}, {left: '$', right: '$', display: false}, {left: '\\(', right: '\\)', display: false}, {left: '\\[', right: '\\]', display: true} ], throwOnError: false, strict: false });

pdf_options.headerTemplate: Math for Machine Learning — A Software Engineer's Guide
pdf_options.footerTemplate: of
